tasks.description: Add input action mappings to project.godot for movement (ui_right, ui_left, ui_up, ui_down), attack (ui_accept), stealth toggle (ui_focus_next), and other required actions
tasks.acceptance: All referenced input actions defined in project.godot; player can move and interact on launch

tasks.description: Fix NetworkManager.Connect() to properly handle async WebSocket connection - track connection state, handle timeouts, report failures to user
tasks.acceptance: Connect() returns actual connection result; state changes trigger UI updates; timeout handling prevents hangs

tasks.description: Align client command definitions with server Command.kt - ensure all 31 server commands have corresponding client handlers with matching message formats
tasks.acceptance: Client executes all server commands; no unknown message type errors; player state syncs correctly

tasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling throughout client - network errors, invalid commands, server errors, timeouts with user-friendly messages
tasks.acceptance: No unhandled exceptions; all error paths show user feedback; logging captures error context

tasks.description: Fix PlayerData property name inconsistency - standardize casing (Level vs level, Username vs username) across client and server serialization
tasks.acceptance: PlayerData serialization is consistent between client and server; no casing mismatches in logs

tasks.description: Implement tutorial/onboarding system for new players - guided introduction covering terminal basics, commands, resources, and progression
tasks.acceptance: Tutorial triggers on first login; at least 5 steps covering core mechanics; state persists across sessions

tasks.description: Improve gameplay feedback - clear visual and text feedback for successful/failed actions, resource costs shown before execution, prominent level-up notifications
tasks.acceptance: All command executions show result feedback; resource costs shown before execution; level-up notifications prominent

tasks.description: Implement auto-reconnection with exponential backoff - up to 3 attempts, user informed of status, session preservation where possible
tasks.acceptance: Up to 3 automatic attempts; user sees status; successful reconnection restores session

tasks.description: Enhance terminal experience - tab completion for all commands, contextual suggestions, consistent formatting, pagination for long outputs
tasks.acceptance: Tab completion works for commands and args; help text comprehensive; output formatting consistent

tasks.description: Synchronize client resource regeneration timing with server tick rate - align regen intervals, prevent desync between client display and server state
tasks.acceptance: Client resource display matches server state; regen timing consistent between client and server

tasks.description: Connect all implemented game systems - ensure all UI panels accessible via commands, systems interact correctly, no orphaned code paths
tasks.acceptance: Every implemented system accessible; cross-system interactions work; no dead UI or commands

tasks.description: Create game balance configuration system - externalize all balance values (costs, rewards, cooldowns) to configuration files
tasks.acceptance: Configuration file for balance values; no hard-coded costs/rewards; easy to tune values

tasks.description: Implement cross-system interactions - equipment affects combat, progression affects unlocks, faction status affects available content
tasks.acceptance: Equipment modifies combat stats; progression gates unlocks; faction status alters available content

tasks.description: Implement event-driven architecture with central event bus for inter-system communication - migrate from direct coupling to event subscription model
tasks.acceptance: Core systems communicate via event bus; no direct cross-system coupling; events logged for debugging

tasks.description: Performance optimization - achieve specific targets: terminal output rendering within 100ms, WebSocket message processing within 50ms, 60 FPS during gameplay, memory under 500MB
tasks.acceptance: All NFR-001 performance targets met; no regressions in core gameplay

tasks.description: Visual effects improvements and sound effects integration
tasks.acceptance: Visual effects polish applied; sound effects integrated and functional

tasks.description: Update documentation and add comprehensive inline comments
tasks.acceptance: Key files documented; inline comments added to complex logic; README updated

tasks.description: Comprehensive testing and audit - end-to-end verification of all systems, security audit (NFR-002: BCrypt, rate limiting, input validation), scalability validation (NFR-003: 2000 concurrent, IP limits), fix remaining bugs
tasks.acceptance: All 31 commands work end-to-end; security controls verified; scalability requirements validated; no crashes during normal gameplay

tasks.description: Fix sprite animation gaps - add missing movement animations for diagonal directions and idle states
tasks.acceptance: All movement directions have proper animations; no visual gaps during direction changes
